name: Lemon Rosemary Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds green beans, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
1 tablespoon minced fresh rosemary leaves or 1 teaspoon dried rosemary crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle of boiling salted water, cook the beans for 5 minutes, or until they are crisp-tender, then drain them.
2. While the beans are cooking, melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat. Add the zest, rosemary (fresh or dried), and season with salt and pepper to taste. Keep the mixture warm.
3. Transfer the beans to a serving dish. Pour the butter mixture over the beans and toss well.
